text: Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! 🎉 Your application has been approved with the event helper role. Thanks for volunteering to help organize our events!
Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been assigned the moderator role. We're excited to have you help keep our community safe and welcoming!
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! 🎉 Your application has been approved and you've been assigned the mentor role. We appreciate your willingness to guide new members!
